coastal.title: Structures lost, highway still closed as crews battle massive Fraser Canyon wildfires
coastal.description: Wildfire officials say they are expecting that the wildfires burning in the Fraser Canyon will expand and grow in the coming days due to the wind and hot weather in the forecast.

all.title: Wildfire season is not as perilous as last year: officials
all.description: Officials previously warned on May 28 that “significant wildfire activity” was expected in B.C. this month in the government's wildfire season preparedness and outlook for 2026.
